title: UAE weather alert: Heavy rain, thunder and traffic chaos hit Dubai and Abu Dhabi — Safety warnings issued
summary_full: Unstable weather has brought sudden showers, strong winds, and reduced visibility across the UAE, particularly impacting Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Motorists are urged to drive cautiously as authorities confirm ongoing unsettled conditions with rainfall expected to continue for the next six days.
